title: Relief from gas: Bombay HC grants makers of acidity med PANTOCID relief in trademark case against PANTOZED
description: The Bombay High Court has restrained a Kenyan pharma company and its Indian contract manufacturer from using the mark “PANTOZED” for their anti‑acidity drug, holding that it prima facie violated Sun Pharma’s “PANTOCID” trademark [Sun Pharma Laboratories Ltd v Zawadi Healthcare Ltd & Anr].Justice Sharmila Deshmukh allowed Sun Pharma Laboratories’ interim application for the restraining order in a trademark infringement suit filed against Zawadi Healthcare Ltd (Kenya) and its Indian manufactur
